---
title: "normalizeScoreSignal()"
description: "Normalizes a ScoreSignal for deterministic pure helpers. Non-finite value/confidence/weight or an empty dimension returns a DATA-style issue."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Normalizes a ScoreSignal for deterministic pure helpers.

Non-finite value/confidence/weight or an empty dimension returns a DATA-style issue.

## Import

```ts
import { normalizeScoreSignal } from "@graphrefly/ts/scoring";
```

## Signature

```ts
function normalizeScoreSignal(signal: ScoreSignal): NormalizedScoreSignal
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `signal` | `ScoreSignal` | signal value used by the helper. |

## Returns

A `NormalizedScoreSignal` value.

## Example

```ts
import { normalizeScoreSignal } from "@graphrefly/ts/scoring";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/scoring/helpers.ts`
